layout_and_spacing.card_style: bg-[#111827]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#233047] rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_24px_-8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
layout_and_spacing.glass_header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#071018]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-[#233047]

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-cyan-600 hover:from-blue-500 hover:to-cyan-500 text-white font-medium rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111827] border border-[#233047] hover:border-blue-500/50 text-slate-200 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200

inputs.textarea: w-full bg-[#071018] border border-[#233047] rounded-xl p-4 text-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 focus:border-cyan-500 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600 resize-none
inputs.text_input: w-full bg-[#071018] border border-[#233047] rounded-xl p-4 text-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500/50 focus:border-cyan-500 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600

components.tabs: flex space-x-2 bg-[#071018] p-1 rounded-xl border border-[#233047] w-fit
components.tab_active: bg-[#111827] text-white shadow-sm rounded-lg border border-[#233047]

motion.page_load: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
motion.card_reveal: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, staggerChildren: 0.1 }}

header.logo: Shield icon (Phosphor), colored with cyan or blue to hint at intelligence/tech.
header.badge: Small pill, border-green-500/30 bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 font-mono text-xs uppercase

specific_sections.disclaimer: Fixed at bottom or prominent below input. bg-orange-500/10 border-l-4 border-orange-500 text-orange-200 p-4 text-sm font-medium.
specific_sections.warning_signs: 3 bento cards, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3, using glassmorphism. Icons in red/orange.
specific_sections.empty_state: Central shield icon (large, 64px+, text-slate-700), text-slate-400. Subtle pulsing animation.
specific_sections.error_state: Card with bg-red-500/10 background, border-red-500/50, friendly text.

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a technical, crisp cyber forensics look.
Build the dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
Load 'Outfit' (headings), 'IBM Plex Sans' (body), and 'JetBrains Mono' (mono/tags) via Google Fonts.
Apply the background image globally with very low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) and mix-blend-screen to create a subtle cyber texture over the #071018 background.
Ensure the Risk Assessment card clearly uses the color mappings (Green/Yellow/Red) based on the risk level.
The Disclaimer ('AI Risk Assessment...') must be highly visible and persistent as per requirements.
Add data-testid attributes to all tabs, buttons, inputs, and result cards.
Implement smooth fade-ins and card slide upward animations using framer-motion.
